data.title: 401GO partners with Catapult HQ, Inc. to streamline workflow for advisors, serving over 30,000 users, reducing manual processes.
data.description: In Sandy, Utah, a new partnership has been formed between 401GO, a 401(k) platform tailored for advisors, and Catapult HQ, Inc., a prominent digital RFP system in the finance industry. This collaboration aims to streamline the plan comparison and selection process for advisors by eliminating existing bottlenecks. Catapult's platform, which is utilized by over 30,000 advisors, will now integrate directly with 401GO's recordkeeping system. This integration will result in a smoother workflow for advisors, reducing the need for manual handoffs.

data.title: ALS Association pledges $2 million for early-stage clinical trials of 2 new ALS therapies. Accelerating new treatments.
data.description: The ALS Association has recently announced the recipients of its 2025 Hoffman ALS Clinical Trial Awards Program in Arlington, Virginia on December 4th. This funding, intended to hasten the advancement of new treatments for ALS, was granted to several individuals. The specific amount awarded was not disclosed, but it is part of the Association's ongoing efforts to support innovative research in ALS treatment.

data.title: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) reports Q3 EPS of 79 cents (missing street view of 88 cents) on sales of $616.2 million. Journeys saw 4% growth and e-commerce decline of 3%. Gross margin contracted to 46.8% from 47.8%.
data.description: Genesco Inc. (NYSE: GCO) saw a decline in its stock value following the release of disappointing third-quarter results. The company reported adjusted earnings of 79 cents per share, falling short of the anticipated 88 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $616.2 million, showing a 3% increase compared to the previous year, but missing the expected $618.6 million. Sales growth was driven by a 4% increase at Journeys, 2% at Schuh, and 3% each at Johnston & Murphy and Genesco Brands. Comparable sales rose by 3%, with store sales up by 5% and e-commerce down by 3%, making up 23% of retail sales. The gross margin shrank to 46.8% from 47.8% due to factors like tariff pressures and license exits within the Genesco Brands Group. Visitors can access the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: BTC stabilizes despite weakening demand, resembling Q1 2022 with 25% supply underwater. ETFs and futures show decreased interest, raising concerns.
data.description: Bitcoin has remained steady above crucial thresholds, reminiscent of early 2022 as over 25% of the supply is currently at a loss. Demand for Bitcoin is decreasing in ETFs and futures markets, indicating potential risks for investors.
Ukraine presidency: President of Ukraine Volodymyr Zelenskyy held a telephone conversation with President of the European Council António Costa.

data.title: Emerson and Armexa partner to offer cybersecurity services for DeltaV platform, simplifying management for customers.
data.description: An alliance has been formed between global automation corporation Emerson and Armexa, a cybersecurity company, based in Houston. The collaboration aims to provide customers utilizing Emerson’s DeltaV™ automation platform with a comprehensive range of advanced operational technology (OT) cybersecurity services on a global scale. This partnership enables DeltaV customers to select a sole, accredited cybersecurity service provider, streamlining vendor management, expediting project schedules, and fortifying operational resilience across their complete OT infrastructure.

data.title: DataCamp named Leader in Technical Skills Development and Enterprise Online Learning by G2 in Winter 2026 Grid Reports. #DataCamp #G2 #education
data.description: DataCamp, a prominent data and AI upskilling platform, has been recognized as a Leader in Technical Skills Development and Enterprise Online Learning by G2 in their Winter 2026 Grid® Reports. G2, a renowned source of authentic peer reviews for software solutions, boasts over 3 million reviews and 100 million annual users. DataCamp obtained the highest combined results in Satisfaction and Mark to attain the Leader ratings. This acknowledgment underscores DataCamp's standing in the industry and its commitment to providing top-notch online learning experiences for users.
ARGAN and DECATHLON unite with low-carbon goal, targeting significant emissions reduction to combat climate change.
Combined shares and voting rights at November 30, 2025 reached a total of 500,000.

data.title: UiPath (NYSE: PATH) exceeds Q3 expectations with $411.11M revenue, 16 cents EPS, up from $354.65M last year. CEO pleased with $1.782B ARR.
data.description: UiPath Inc. (NYSE: PATH) exceeded expectations in its third-quarter financial report released on Wednesday. The company reported adjusted earnings of 16 cents per share, outperforming the anticipated 15 cents per share. Quarterly revenue stood at $411.11 million, surpassing the consensus estimate of $392.97 million. This marked a significant increase from the $354.65 million generated in the same quarter last year. UiPath's Annual Recurring Revenue (ARR) for the quarter reached $1.782 billion, reflecting an 11% year-over-year growth. CEO Daniel Dines expressed satisfaction with the results, attributing the success to the team's dedication and effective execution, as well as the increasing adoption of automation solutions by customers.

data.title: Digital logistics market set to exceed $85 billion by 2030, growing at a 25% CAGR driven by e-commerce growth and supply chain oversight.
data.description: Dublin - A report titled "Digital Logistics Market - Global Industry Size, Share, Trends, Opportunity, & Forecast, 2020-2030" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. The Global Digital Logistics Market is projected to increase from USD 22.30 billion in 2024 to USD 85.07 billion by 2030, reflecting a Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 25%. The growth can be attributed to factors such as the rapid expansion of e-commerce leading to heightened demand for efficient and transparent delivery services, as well as the rising necessity for real-time supervision of supply chains. Key drivers of this market expansion include the surge in e-commerce and escalating requirements for immediate supply chain management.

data.title: Ulta Beauty (NASDAQ: ULTA) to report Q3 earnings on Dec. 4, expected at $4.60 per share, revenue at $2.7 billion. CFO appointed, shares fell 0.6% to $544.52.
data.description: Ulta Beauty, Inc. is set to announce its Q3 earnings after the market closes on December 4th. Analysts predict earnings per share to be $4.60, a decrease from $5.14 in the previous year. Revenue for the quarter is expected to be around $2.7 billion, up from $2.53 billion last year. Christopher DelOrefice was recently appointed as the company's CFO. Ulta Beauty's stock closed at $544.52, down 0.6% on Wednesday. For more information and analyst ratings, visit Benzinga's website.

data.title: Descartes Systems Group Inc. had better-than-expected Q3 earnings, reporting 50 cents/share and $187.681M in sales. Analysts cut forecasts post-results.
data.description: The Descartes Systems Group Inc. (NASDAQ: DSGX) exceeded expectations with its third-quarter earnings report. The company posted earnings of 50 cents per share, surpassing the analyst consensus of 45 cents per share. Additionally, Descartes reported quarterly sales of $187.681 million, beating the analyst consensus of $184.612 million. CEO Edward J. Ryan credited the strong performance to the continued expansion of their Global Logistics Network, providing solutions and content. This growth comes amidst challenges such as tariff fluctuations and operational changes. For the full story, visit a financial news website.

data.title: Maintenance scheduled for Soneium services on OKX Wallet from December 3, 2025; impact on service but security ensured through third-party nodes.
data.description: Starting on December 3, 2025, OKX Wallet will undergo maintenance for Soneium network services. This maintenance will impact service availability temporarily, but asset security will be maintained through the use of third-party nodes. For more information, visit the official announcement.

data.title: Triple-therapy immunotherapy shows promise in eliminating leukemia in preclinical models. Key milestone reached in fight against blood cancer.
data.description: GT Biopharma, Inc. has recently reported significant progress in the field of triple-therapy immunotherapy. According to a news commentary released from Vancouver, BC on December 4, 2025, the company's innovative approach has resulted in complete leukemia elimination in preclinical models. This breakthrough is achieved by reprogramming the process through which cancer cells die, thereby activating strong immune responses. The promising results of this triple-therapy approach highlight its potential to revolutionize leukemia treatment. This news showcases the latest advancements in the fight against cancer and underscores the importance of immunotherapy research.

data.title: Five Below reports $1.04B revenue, beats estimates. Q3 earnings at 68 cents per share exceed 24 cents estimate. Q4 guidance: $1.58B-$1.61B revenue, $3.36-$3.54 EPS.Raised full-year guidance.
data.description: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ: FIVE) exceeded expectations in its third-quarter financial report with $1.04 billion in revenue, surpassing the estimated $983.07 million. Adjusted earnings of 68 cents per share also outperformed the anticipated 24 cents per share. CEO Winnie Park expressed excitement over the results, highlighting over $1 billion in sales for two consecutive quarters and strong double-digit same-store sales growth. The company projects fourth-quarter revenue between $1.58 billion and $1.61 billion, with adjusted earnings ranging from $3.36 to $3.54 per share. Analysts had forecasted revenue around $1.56 billion and adjusted earnings of $3.10 per share. Additionally, Five Below raised its full-year revenue guidance.
